name: the-red-tent
description: Anita Diamant's The Red Tent — a novel reclaiming the voice of Dinah, daughter of Jacob, and celebrating the world of ancient womanhood, sisterhood, and the sacred bonds between women.
useCase: Reclaiming silenced stories, female community, tradition and heritage, motherhood and birth, finding your voice, love and loss.
knownRisks: The novel is fiction, not biblical scholarship — some details are imagined
The depiction of ancient womanhood is idealized in places
The novel's portrayal of biblical figures may challenge traditional religious views
